title: Medium Large Natural Jute Bag with Contrasting Blue Handle and Blue Sides and Natural Jute Bag with Pink Handle and Sides Pack Size 1 to 100 30cm x 30cm x 20cm (Pink Sides & Handles, 1)
features: PP lining inside to make the bags waterproof and spillage proof

Bags are fully handmade from natural plant fibre jute. Jute is made by biodegrading jute fibre in water and then drying them out in sun. The bags will have fibre remnants, or as they are handmade each one can be slightly different from the other. Such imperfections makes jute products unique.
description: Product Description Medium Burlap Jute Shopper Attractive Reusable Gift Bag Pink or Blue Handle and Sides Approx dimension 30 x 30 x 19 cm / 11.81 x 11.81 x 7.48 inches Can be conveniently used as daily use bag, shopper bag, Gift Bag Laminated inside.
